home.heroSubtitle: Connect, chat, share your moments with the world and earn gifts
home.randomVideoDesc: Meet new people face to face
home.randomAudioDesc: Talk freely and make new friends

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.securePaymentDesc: We support all global and local payment methods compatible with Google Play Store and Apple Store. All transactions are encrypted and secure.
wallet.withdrawNote: Withdrawal requests are processed within 24-72 business hours. Minimum withdrawal is 1,000 coins.
wallet.buyMilesDesc: Purchase miles to use advanced search filters and connect worldwide
wallet.milesInfoDesc: Miles let you use advanced filters in the Around the World section such as country, gender, and age to connect with who you want

profile.title: Profile
profile.referralDesc: Share your link and earn rewards
profile.notifGiftsDesc: When you receive or send a gift
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.deleteWarning: All your data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered

auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.referralInvite: You were invited by referral agent
auth.otpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone

privacy.s1Content: We collect information you provide directly when creating your account, such as name and email.
privacy.s2Content: We use your data to improve user experience, provide technical support, and ensure platform security.
privacy.s3Content: We use the latest encryption technologies to protect your personal data and conversations.

terms.s1Content: Users must be at least 18 years old to use live streaming services.
terms.s2Content: The use of profanity or inappropriate content in rooms is strictly prohibited.
terms.s3Content: Purchased points are non-refundable after being used to send gifts.

notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.description: Did you forget to add the page to the router?

appDownload.enableSectionDesc: When enabled, the app download section will be visible to users
appDownload.domainHint: Enter the primary domain. The extension path will be appended to form the full download URL
appDownload.directUrlHint: If you have an external download link different from the domain, enter it here
appDownload.preview: Preview — how it will appear to users

pwa.title: PWA (Web App)
pwa.enableDesc: Progressive Web App — works directly from the browser without download
pwa.descPlaceholder: Web version — works directly from the browser

apk.title: APK (Android)
apk.enableDesc: APK file for direct installation on Android devices
apk.descPlaceholder: APK file — for direct install on Android devices

aab.title: AAB (Google Store)
aab.enableDesc: AAB file for uploading to Google Play Store
aab.descPlaceholder: AAB file — for uploading to Google Play Store

socialLogin.hint: Enter OAuth credentials for each provider. Enable/disable login as needed.

seoTexts.hint: Manage SEO texts for each page of the application

featured.title: Featured Streams on Homepage
featured.description: Select accounts allowed to appear in the featured live stream section at the top of the homepage

popup.enableDesc: When enabled, the popup will appear to users automatically
popup.showOnceDesc: Show the popup only once per session
popup.delayDesc: Number of seconds before the popup appears
popup.subtitlePlaceholder: e.g. Recharge your wallet and get double coins

pricing.title: Call & Message Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Control voice/video call rates and text message costs. Coins are automatically deducted from user balance
pricing.voiceCallRateDesc: Coins charged per minute of voice call
pricing.videoCallRateDesc: Coins charged per minute of video call
pricing.messageCostDesc: Coins charged per text message sent

worldPricing.title: Around the World Pricing
worldPricing.subtitle: Control the costs of search filters in the Around the World section. Coins are deducted when a search starts
worldPricing.gender_bothDesc: Extra cost when selecting both genders
worldPricing.gender_maleDesc: Extra cost when filtering for males only
worldPricing.gender_femaleDesc: Extra cost when filtering for females only
worldPricing.age_rangeDesc: Extra cost when setting a custom age range
worldPricing.country_specificDesc: Extra cost when selecting a specific country
worldPricing.country_allDesc: Extra cost when searching all countries (usually free)

milesPricing.title: Miles Pricing
milesPricing.subtitle: Control mile package prices that users can purchase
milesPricing.costPerMileDesc: Coin equivalent for one mile (for internal use)

fraud.subtitle: Monitor and detect suspicious & fraudulent activities

dashboard.referralLinkHelp: When a new user registers through your link, they are automatically linked to your account and you earn commission on all their purchases.

dashboard.step2Desc: When users sign up through your link, they are linked to your account
dashboard.step3Desc: You earn commission on every purchase made by your referred users
